explanation: This property states that the controller's operational state must always be one of the specified modes. This captures the intent that the controller is restricted to operating within these defined modes.
bool_exp3: StartUpMode | SelfTestMode | StandbyMode | PCVMode | PSVMode | failSafeMode
decision1_substring: The controller shall implement the following modes:
decision3_substring: Start-up Mode, Self-Test Mode, VentilationOff, Pressure Controlled Venilation Mode, Pressure Support Ventilation Mode, fail-safe.
output_structured_natural_language: always satisfy StartUpMode | SelfTestMode | StandbyMode | PCVMode | PSVMode | failSafeMode
